name: NEAR AI
description: NEAR AI Cloud TEE inference provider via an OpenAI-compatible API.

NEARAI_API_KEY.label: API Key
NEARAI_API_KEY.help: API key used to authenticate requests to NEAR AI Cloud.

NEARAI_BASE_URL.label: Base URL
NEARAI_BASE_URL.help: Base URL for the NEAR AI Cloud OpenAI-compatible API.

NEARAI_SMALL_MODEL.label: Small Model
NEARAI_SMALL_MODEL.help: Override the default NEAR AI small text model identifier.

NEARAI_LARGE_MODEL.label: Large Model
NEARAI_LARGE_MODEL.help: Override the default NEAR AI large text model identifier.

NEARAI_EXPERIMENTAL_TELEMETRY.label: Experimental Telemetry
NEARAI_EXPERIMENTAL_TELEMETRY.help: Enable experimental telemetry features for enhanced debugging and usage analytics.

NEARAI_BROWSER_BASE_URL.label: Browser Base URL
NEARAI_BROWSER_BASE_URL.help: Browser-only proxy endpoint base URL for NEAR AI requests. Do not expose API keys in browser clients.
